apps.title: Blog
apps.description: lmthing.blog — personalized AI news, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + newsroom space).

apps.title: Personal Feed
apps.description: Hand-authored reference app for the project-as-application engine: a personal reading feed with a database table, list/mark-read/add-item API endpoints, a page, and a database hook that enriches new items.

apps.title: Health
apps.description: lmthing.health — personal health research page, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + clinic space). Not medical advice.

apps.title: Homes
apps.description: lmthing.homes — an AI-assisted home finder, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + intake & scout spaces). Paste the alert emails and links you already get; agents clean every capture into one comparable record — true cost, real size, commute times — read the listing for what it hides, triangulate the fuzzed map pin, and rank everything by a taste model learned from your own saves and dismisses.

apps.title: Kitchen
apps.description: lmthing.kitchen — pantry + meal planner, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + chef space).

apps.title: Trips
apps.description: lmthing.trips — an AI trip planner, as a project-application (database + pages + api + hooks + concierge space).

spaces.title: Demo (Echo)
spaces.description: A self-contained demo integration for trying the lmthing integration engine end-to-end against your own echo endpoint (e.g. webhook.site) — no real provider account needed.

DEMO_API_TOKEN.title: API token (sent as a Bearer header)

spaces.title: Discord
spaces.description: Control a Discord bot from THING — post, edit, reply, and react in your server, and answer slash commands.

spaces.title: GitHub
spaces.description: Create issues, search code, and list PRs on GitHub.

spaces.title: Google
spaces.description: Google Calendar and Gmail via your own access token.

spaces.title: LINE
spaces.description: Send LINE messages and reply to inbound LINE chats via THING.

spaces.title: Mattermost
spaces.description: Post to Mattermost and receive Mattermost messages via THING.

spaces.title: Nextcloud Talk
spaces.description: Send and receive Nextcloud Talk (Spreed) messages via THING using a Talk bot.

spaces.title: Slack
spaces.description: Post to Slack and receive Slack messages via THING.

spaces.title: SMS
spaces.description: Send and receive text messages (SMS/MMS) through your own Twilio number via THING.

spaces.title: Synology Chat
spaces.description: Send messages to Synology Chat and reply to Synology Chat messages via THING.

spaces.title: Telegram
spaces.description: Send Telegram messages and receive Telegram chats via THING.

spaces.title: WhatsApp
spaces.description: Send WhatsApp messages and reply to incoming WhatsApp chats via THING (Meta Cloud API).
